case_title: MARKUS MERLINO VS. BENEFIT COSMETICS, LLC, A CA. LIMITED LIABILITY CO et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-16-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- DEFENDANTS BENEFIT COSMETICS, LLC, KATHY LORGE, APHRODITE MITROPOULOS AND JUDY NICHOLL'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- MOTION TO STRIKE THE 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF AMENDED THE COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CCP SECTION 473. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3: OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 5: THE DEMURRER IS MOOT. REGARDING CAUSE OF ACTION 6: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. REGARDING CAUSE OF ACTION 7, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR FAILURE TO ALLEGE FACTS ESTABLISHING A CAUSAL NEXUS BETWEEN PLAINTIFF'S EXERCISE OF HIS RIGHTS UNDER THE CALIFORNIA FAMILY RIGHTS ACT AND AN ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. (CB/301/EH) REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR #7855

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Valerie L. Sharpe, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON 433-1940, for defendants Benefit Cosmetics LLC, Kathy Lorge, Aphrodite Mitropoulos and Judy Nicholls, demurring to complaint
Daniel Feder, Esq., 391-9476, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS BENEFIT COSMETICS, LLC, KATHY LORGE, APHRODITE MITROPOULOS and JUDY NICHOLL'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT --
Motion to Strike the 4th and 5th causes of action is granted; Plaintiff amended
the complaint without leave to amend. CCP section 473.

Demurrer to causes of action 2 and 3: overruled.
Demurrer to causes of action 4 and 5: the demurrer is moot.

Regarding cause of action 6: Sustained without leave to amend.

Regarding cause of action 7, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for
failure to allege facts establishing a causal nexus between Plaintiff's exercise
of his rights under the California Family Rights Act and an adverse employment
action by Defendants. Defendant is to prepare an order. (CB/301/EH) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Valerie L. Sharpe, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON 433-1940, for defendants Benefit Cosmetics LLC, Kathy Lorge, Aphrodite Mitropoulos and Judy Nicholls, demurring to complaint
Sue Ochs, Esq., 648-2043, specially appearing for plaintiff's counsel Daniel Feder for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court took DEFENDANTs BENEFIT COSMETICS, LLC, Kathy Lorge,
Aphrodite Mitropoulos and Judy Nicholls' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT under submission.
(PHA/301/DR) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
